_comment: Generated campaign targeting Meridian Technologies -- personalized from enrichment data

key_quotes.quote: reps spend more time fighting the system than selling

subject: Meridian's CRM evaluation -- data from 847 Salesforce reviews
body:
Hi Michael,

I noticed Meridian Technologies is evaluating CRM alternatives ahead of your Q3 renewal. You're not alone -- 89 Salesforce customers in our dataset have flagged active churn intent this quarter, with pricing as the #1 driver.

Three data points that might be useful for your evaluation:

1. Companies in the 500-1000 employee range switching from Salesforce report an average 40% cost reduction in year one
2. HubSpot (which you're evaluating) has the strongest displacement signal -- 67 confirmed switches from Salesforce in the last 90 days
3. The most common post-switch regret is around integration re-platforming, not the CRM itself

We've built an intelligence brief on the Salesforce-to-HubSpot migration path that covers what 67 companies experienced. Would it be helpful if I sent it over?

Best,
[Name]
cta: Request the Salesforce-to-HubSpot migration intelligence brief
